name: Marial Goldsmith
title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Hello World! Thank you for coming to my page. Since you are curious about me, I'll tell you a little about myself. I am a builder at heart. I enjoy taking on complex technical challenges and transforming them into structured, automated, and observable systems that others can rely on. I love working at the intersection of engineering and enablement; building tools that remove friction and give teams clarity. My best description? Curious by nature and motivated by impact. When i am not working you might catch me at my older son's football game or my older daughter cheerleading performance. I could also be at a piano concert for my little boy or trying to chase my baby daughter at gymnastics. And if everything fails, I am probably playing Fallout with all of them. Being a mom and a wife is my greatest joy!
